children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Effective for each of the 2014 through 2031 crop years, in the case of a producer that would be eligible for a loan deficiency payment under for wheat, barley, or oats, but that elects to use acreage planted to the wheat, barley, or oats for the grazing of livestock, the Secretary shall make a payment to the producer under this section if the producer enters into an agreement with the Secretary to forgo any other harvesting of the wheat, barley, or oats on that acreage.section 9035 of this title

children.heading: Grazing of triticale acreage
children.label: 2 Grazing of triticale acreage
children.text: Effective for each of the 2014 through 2031 crop years, with respect to a producer on a farm that uses acreage planted to triticale for the grazing of livestock, the Secretary shall make a payment to the producer under this section if the producer enters into an agreement with the Secretary to forgo any other harvesting of triticale on that acreage.

children.label: A
children.text: the loan deficiency payment rate determined under in effect, as of the date of the agreement, for the county in which the farm is located; bysection 9035(c) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the quantity of the grazed acreage on the farm with respect to which the producer elects to forgo harvesting of wheat, barley, or oats; and

children.label: I
children.text: the payment yield in effect for the calculation of price loss coverage under with respect to that loan commodity on the farm;section 9015 of this title

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of a farm for which agriculture risk coverage is elected under , the payment yield that would otherwise be in effect with respect to that loan commodity on the farm in the absence of such election; orsection 9016(a) of this title

children.label: III
children.text: in the case of a farm for which no payment yield is otherwise established for that loan commodity on the farm, an appropriate yield established by the Secretary in a manner consistent with .section 9013(c) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the loan deficiency payment rate determined under in effect for wheat, as of the date of the agreement, for the county in which the farm is located; bysection 9035(c) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the quantity of the grazed acreage on the farm with respect to which the producer elects to forgo harvesting of triticale; and

children.label: I
children.text: the payment yield in effect for the calculation of price loss coverage under subchapter I with respect to wheat on the farm;

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of a farm for which agriculture risk coverage is elected under , the payment yield that would otherwise be in effect for wheat on the farm in the absence of such election; orsection 9016(a) of this title

children.label: III
children.text: in the case of a farm for which no payment yield is otherwise established for wheat on the farm, an appropriate yield established by the Secretary in a manner consistent with .section 9013(c) of this title

children.heading: Time, manner, and availability of payment
children.label: c Time, manner, and availability of payment

children.heading: Time and manner
children.label: 1 Time and manner
children.text: A payment under this section shall be made at the same time and in the same manner as loan deficiency payments are made under .section 9035 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall establish an availability period for the payments authorized by this section.

children.heading: Certain commodities
children.label: B Certain commodities
children.text: In the case of wheat, barley, and oats, the availability period shall be consistent with the availability period for the commodity established by the Secretary for marketing assistance loans authorized by this subchapter.

children.heading: Prohibition on crop insurance indemnity or noninsured crop assistance
children.label: d Prohibition on crop insurance indemnity or noninsured crop assistance
children.text: A 2014 through 2031 crop of wheat, barley, oats, or triticale planted on acreage that a producer elects, in the agreement required by subsection (a), to use for the grazing of livestock in lieu of any other harvesting of the crop shall not be eligible for an indemnity under a policy or plan of insurance authorized under the Federal Crop Insurance Act ( et seq.) or noninsured crop assistance under .7 U.S.C. 1501section 7333 of this title
